calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-04-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioners/Parents Hazuki Murakami Fester and Michael Fester present in pro per, were sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Hazuki Murakami.
The Court further grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to : Coral Sango Murakami-Fester and Amber Kohaku Murakami-Fester.
Decree signed in open court.
